package.name: nav_algo_bringup
package.description: move_base launch + yaml configs that load nav_algo_smac_ros1 (global) and nav_algo_mppi_ros1 (local) as planner/controller plugins. The costmap layers consume /robot/traversability_grid published by trav_pipeline_ros1, completing the Noetic-side pipeline started by Point-LIO + elevation_mapping_cupy_ros1.
